text.message: any wheat trades? got brick and sheep
dont make me trade with black pls
we are not making you do anything
you are your own sentien being
well i need to advance my game somehow
theres no advance if black wins
yea so it should be in your interest towork with me#
my interest is also advance my game and trading you wheat is not in my best interest
its not like we have to trade 1 for 1
its not like we have to trade at all
my point is that you do you, dont put it on us
i respect it#im just bored by low interaction games
if you dont try to connect gg
we all win on our turn
